title: ruehssia amylacea
intro: Ruehssia amylacea, also known as Amygdalin, is a plant-based compound extracted from the seeds of the Prunus dulcis plant, commonly referred to as bitter almond. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of cancer, as it contains a compound called amygdalin, which releases cyanide when ingested, which has been studied for its potential to selectively target and kill cancer cells. The health benefits of Ruehssia amylacea include its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential role in preventing the growth and spread of cancer cells. Ruehssia amylacea can be prepared as a supplement, often in the form of bitter almond extract or amygdalin capsules, but it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
